reasoning: The question asks if Wikipedia's "List of infectious diseases" will report "Yes" for a Tinea barbae vaccine by three resolution dates in late 2025/early 2026. The likelihood of a sudden medical breakthrough, commercialization, and subsequent Wikipedia page update within a 3-month horizon is close to zero. The only pathway for a "Yes" resolution would be uncorrected Wikipedia vandalism or the inclusion of an obscure/experimental animal vaccine, both of which are highly improbable to remain uncontested on such a high-traffic medical article.
